title: Shri Chintpurni Temple, Himachal Pradesh
intro: Shri Chintpurni Temple, located in the Una district of Himachal Pradesh, is an extremely holy Shakti Peeth. The temple is dedicated to Mata Chhinnamastika Devi.
description:
Shri Chintpurni Temple – Una, Himachal Pradesh
Introduction
Shri Chintpurni Temple, located in the Una district of Himachal Pradesh, is an extremely holy Shakti Peeth. The temple is dedicated to Mata Chhinnamastika Devi. It is believed that the Mother Goddess takes away all the 'worries' (Chinta) of the devotees who visit here, which is why she is known as 'Chintpurni'.
Temple Information
 Temple Name: Shri Chintpurni Temple
 Other Names: Mata Shri Chhinnamastika Dham
 Location: Chintpurni, Una District, Himachal Pradesh 177110
 Presiding Goddess: Mata Chintpurni (Chhinnamastika Devi)
 Significance: One of the 51 Shakti Peethas.
History and Significance
According to mythology, Mata Sati's head fell at this spot, making it a prominent Shakti Peeth. The divine idol of Mata Chhinnamastika is enshrined here. Devotees visit to fulfill their wishes and receive the Mother's blessings.
How to Reach
✈️ By Air: Gaggal (Kangra) Airport is the nearest (approx. 60-70 km). Chandigarh Airport is also a viable option.
🚆 By Train: 'Amb Andaura' Railway Station is the nearest (approx. 20 km). Taxis and buses are easily available from there.
🛣️ By Road: The temple is well-connected to Chandigarh, Hoshiarpur, and Dharamshala.
Best Time to Visit
 Ideal Time for Travel: September to March.
 Special Occasions: During Chaitra and Sharad Navratri, the temple sees a massive influx of devotees.
Temple Timings
🕒 Timing: Generally from 4:00 AM to 11:00 PM.
Nearby Attractions
 Jwala Ji Temple (Kangra)
 Naina Devi Temple
 Gobind Sagar Lake
Conclusion
Chintpurni Temple is a center of faith where the mind finds immense peace. Through the Mother's grace, devotees' worries are alleviated, and they receive spiritual strength.

faq.q1: To which Goddess is the Chintpurni Temple dedicated?
faq.a1: This temple is dedicated to Mother Chintpurni Devi.
faq.q2: Where is the Chintpurni Temple located?
faq.a2: It is located in Chintpurni, Una district, Himachal Pradesh.
faq.q3: What is the Chintpurni Temple famous for?
faq.a3: It is famous as a Shakti Peeth, for deep devotion, and for the faith that devotees' wishes are fulfilled here.
faq.q4: What is the best time to visit the Chintpurni Temple?
faq.a4: The period from September to March is considered ideal for travel.
faq.q5: What are the major festivals of the Chintpurni Temple?
faq.a5: Chaitra Navratri and Sharad Navratri are the major festivals.
